data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Netflix implements a zero trust model to ensure strict identity verification.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes IAM, MFA, and strict access control policies.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Netflix deploys technology to mitigate distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs AWS Shield and load balancing strategies to reduce impact.

data.title: Encryption and Data Protection
data.description: Ensures data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry standards.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Response
data.description: Proactive threat detection and incident response using advanced monitoring tools.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging SIEM tools, machine learning for anomalous patterns.

data.title: Security Awareness Training
data.description: Continuous security training programs for employees to mitigate human threats.
data.technical_spec: Regular phishing simulations and awareness modules.
